sources.label: engsoccerdata
sources.coverage: League, FA Cup, and historical result backbone.
sources.notes: Used for result-level official fixtures and scores; player events and lineups are not expected from this source.

sources.label: openfootball
sources.notes: Used by the automatic update pipeline for result-level changes after matches are completed.

sources.label: Wikipedia match and season articles
sources.coverage: European fixtures, League Cup, super cups, finals, late-round cup articles, scorers, attendances, and structured lineups where available.
sources.notes: Best-effort enrichment source; every extracted fact is validated into canonical JSON before the database build.

sources.label: Wikipedia Manchester United player lists
sources.coverage: Competitive first-team player starts, substitute appearances, total appearances, and goals across the three Manchester United player-list pages.
sources.notes: Used for verified headline player totals. The source pages exclude wartime matches and the abandoned 1939-40 season; imported with attribution metadata in data/canonical/player-records.json.

sources.label: Wikidata and Wikimedia Commons
sources.coverage: Licensed player image candidates via Wikidata P18, Wikipedia pageimages, and Wikimedia Commons file metadata.
sources.notes: Preferred image source because Commons exposes license and attribution metadata. Wikipedia pageimages may be used as a fallback only when Commons imageinfo is available. Do not replace with club or agency images unless explicit reuse permission is captured.

sources.label: Football Wiki (Fandom)
sources.coverage: Manual portrait fallback when no Wikimedia image exists for a player in the media cohort.
sources.notes: Fandom community content is CC BY-SA 3.0; individual file provenance is recorded per player in data/canonical/player-media.json. Cached locally under public/media/sources/ — not hotlinked at runtime.

sources.label: Wikidata (position played on team)
sources.coverage: Primary playing position per player from Wikidata property P413, resolved via the enwiki sitelink stored on each player record and collapsed to GK/DEF/MID/FWD buckets.
sources.notes: Structured and complete for the substantive register (~100% of the top cohorts), tapering on obscure pre-war players; a player with no P413 carries no position and is omitted rather than guessed. Primary position is Wikidata's preferred-ranked claim, else the first listed.

sources.label: Curated project correction
sources.coverage: Manual corrections and historically checked records added through repository review.
sources.notes: Use this when a pull request corrects or fills a fact from a named book, archive, programme, RSSSF page, or other cited source.

sources.label: RSSSF
sources.coverage: Historical competition records and scorer backfill candidates.
sources.notes: Planned/curated enrichment source for post-war scorers and competition cross-checks.

sources.label: football-data.org
sources.coverage: Modern match metadata and lineup enrichment where the free key exposes the needed fields.
sources.notes: Optional enrichment source controlled by FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN; not required for the result pipeline.

sources.label: transfermarkt-datasets
sources.coverage: Modern match events, substitutions, cards, attendance, starting lineups, and bench lineups from 2012 onward where available.
sources.notes: Used as the preferred modern enrichment source; raw CSV snapshots are cached under data/raw/transfermarkt-datasets.

sources.label: MUFCInfo match lineups
sources.coverage: Historical Manchester United and Newton Heath match-page lineup rows, including shirt numbers and substituted-on players where exposed.
sources.notes: Used for conservative match-lineup enrichment and data/canonical/player-shirts.json summaries. Raw pages are cached under data/raw/mufcinfo and are not redistributed.

sources.label: MUFCInfo goal minutes
sources.coverage: Goal minutes from the scoreboard block of historical Manchester United and Newton Heath match pages, backfilling the minute on existing goal events (chiefly pre-1980s, where scorers were known but minutes were not).
sources.notes: Used by scripts/ingest/mufcinfo-goal-minutes.ts to stamp minutes onto existing goal events only when the parsed scorers reconcile 1:1 with the recorded goals for that side. Never creates or re-scores events. Raw pages are cached under data/raw/mufcinfo and are not redistributed.

sources.label: MUFCInfo transfer archive
sources.coverage: Manchester United and Newton Heath player transfers (arrivals and departures) from 1883 to the present, by decade: direction, other club, date, and GBP fee where known. Historical fees are frequently unrecorded and are kept as a fee kind, never as a zero.
sources.notes: Used by scripts/ingest/mufcinfo-transfers.ts to build data/canonical/transfers.json. The decade pages are cached under data/raw/mufcinfo/transfers and are not redistributed.

sources.label: Mrs Smokers' records
sources.coverage: Season-level goalscorer, assist and (uniquely) types of goals. The only structured assist data this project has before 2012-13. Curated by a poster on Redcafe (Mrs Smoker) and not exhaustive.
sources.notes: Season-level aggregate, not match-attributed (no dates or minutes), so it never enters match_events. Raw exports under data/sources/tableau/; normalized into data/canonical/tableau-goals-assists.json and tableau-goal-types.json.

sources.label: Books, programmes, and archive records
sources.coverage: Pre-war and post-war scorer, lineup, abandoned, wartime, friendly, and tour records where structured open datasets are thin.
sources.notes: Use in curated PRs with the publication, page, archive call number, or programme issue captured in match notes.
